rules: REQ-001: No Math.random() or non-deterministic logic permitted.
REQ-002: Player movement is exactly 1 tile orthogonally per turn.
REQ-003: Movement fails if target coordinates are < 0 or >= gridSize.
REQ-004: Attacks target enemies exactly 1 tile away orthogonally.
REQ-005: Damage dealt is exactly equal to attackPower.
REQ-006: Transition to 'WIN' immediately when all enemies' hp <= 0.
REQ-007: Transition to 'LOSE' immediately when hero's hp <= 0.
RULE-008: Enemy movement priority is X-axis then Y-axis.
RULE-009: Entities cannot overlap on the same tile.
RULE-010: Enemy turn order is sorted by Enemy ID ascending.

files.description: CLI entry point; handles --scenario argument and maps it to initial state.
Contains core game loop, deterministic movement, and combat logic.
